base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of ending_screens — a ui (menu_screen) from 1988 super mario bros 3. Ending cutscene — Princess-rescue, King-thank-you sequence across 8 worlds, credits. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
